title: GGUF model loading + tokenizer cache (LlamaCppRuntime)
goal: Implement the GGUF loader path for LlamaCppRuntime: mmap-or-direct-load via llama-cpp-2 LlamaModelParams, tokenizer extraction + caching, GPU offload params, context size declaration. Verify against a representative GGUF (a small <2 GiB Llama-3.2 or Qwen GGUF) in tests.
expected_diff_shape: Fill gguf_loader.rs with LlamaModelParams construction, tokenizer cache map; new tests/llama_cpp_loader_tests.rs exercising load with a fixture GGUF (gated by a feature flag because the GGUF is too large for repo).
implementation_notes: Per AC-LLAMACPP-ADAPTER: GGUF transformer load is the default path. LlamaModelParams: `n_gpu_layers: u32 (0 = pure CPU; -1 = offload all; operator-configurable), main_gpu: u32, vocab_only: bool, use_mmap: bool (true default; faster load on Windows + NVMe), use_mlock: bool (false default; mlock not always available on Windows)`. Loader: validate the file magic bytes (GGUF v2/v3) before passing to llama_cpp_2; if magic mismatch, return LoadError("not a GGUF v2/v3 artifact"). Tokenizer extraction: GGUF carries embedded BPE/SentencePiece tokenizer in its metadata; expose `LlamaTokenizer { vocab_size, bos_id, eos_id, special_tokens }` via tokenizer_cache. TokenizerCache: `HashMap<ModelId, Arc<LlamaTokenizer>>` shared across generate calls so tokenize() isn't re-parsing GGUF metadata per request. Context creation: LlamaContextParams with `n_ctx: u32 (operator-set, default 8192), n_batch: u32 (512 default), n_threads: u32 (operator-set, default min(8, num_cpus)), embeddings: bool (true for embed() path), causal_attn: bool (true), n_seq_max: u32 (1 default; raised by self-spec MT-109)`. Per-feature gating: tests/llama_cpp_loader_tests.rs gated by env var HANDSHAKE_TEST_GGUF_PATH — if unset, skip the load test (CI without GPU/large-model fixtures still runs other tests). If env var present, point at a small <2 GiB GGUF on disk (operator provides; e.g., a Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.gguf at ~1 GiB). Test: load model, assert ModelId v7, assert tokenizer vocab_size > 0, assert load_duration_ms recorded, unload and assert ledger row terminated.
risk_if_missed: GGUF load path is incomplete; LlamaCppRuntime never accepts real models; subsequent generate MT cannot proceed.
validator_focus: GGUF magic-byte validation; tokenizer cache reuse across calls (no re-parse); GPU offload param honored; env-var-gated GGUF fixture skip path is documented.
